items.raw_desc: Társas HitStory:                An evening of laughter with the HitStory board gameGet ready for an evening of rhythm, laughter and musical memories with the HitStory board game. The game is ideal for parties with friends or family, where each song becomes a challenge and an opportunity to have fun. Start the best playlist and listen carefully. Your task is to guess the year in which each song was released. If you manage to guess both the title of the song and the name of the artist, you will get points and everyone will applaud you. For even more fun, activate the "Surprise Guest" mode and turn each round into an unexpected surprise. Play continues until one player scores 7 points or the last refrain of the night is played - either way, the winner will be the star of the night. The game uses the HitStory app, which can be downloaded for free from Google Play or the App Store. You'll also need a mobile phone with an internet connection and a Spotify Premium account.                             12+        recommended age...

items.raw_desc: Pótalkatrész OMRON inhalációs készlet:If you enjoy treating common colds and various respiratory ailments by effectively applying medication in the form of an inhalation aerosol directly into your lungs with the Celimed U-615 (NB-152U) ultrasonic inhaler, you'll appreciate the spare parts kit to keep your inhaler functional and safe for your health. Prolonged use of the inhaler may cause wear and tear of some parts, contamination with bacteria or contamination with injected drugs. This cannot be prevented even with very careful maintenance, hygiene and disinfection. The ideal solution is to completely replace the most susceptible parts at least once a year. The OMRON inhalation set contains everything you need in one package - mask for children and adults, inhalation hoses, mouthpieces, medication containers and sealing ring. Thanks to the quick and easy exchange, your inhaler will be as good as new again, ready to help you in case of illness. The individual parts are made of PVC and cannot be sterilised by boiling. A lábas tömör alumíniumból készült, és magas minőségű PFLUON GRANIT tapadásmentes felülettel rendelkezik. Ebben az edényben főzhetsz, süthetsz, párolhatsz, piríthatsz, sőt, sütőben is használhatod minimális zsiradék mellett, anélkül hogy az étel leégne. Ez az edény minden főzési módhoz alkalmas, beleértve az indukciós főzőlapot is, és akár 200 °C-os sütőben is használható. Az elkészített ételeket a lábasban kényelmesen tárolhatod a hűtőben is, és természetesen mosogatógépben is mosható. Az ORION GRANDE tökéletes választás az egészségesebb főzéshez.
